description_long: This is a modern residential house complex featuring multiple interconnected units with flat and gable roofs, surrounded by landscaped yards and driveways. The exterior is finished in a mix of white, gray, and natural wood tones, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property includes private garages, fenced-in patios, and a central driveway that separates two main building clusters. Palm trees and greenery are integrated into the landscaping, enhancing the contemporary urban aesthetic. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some units featuring balconies and rooftop terraces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of privacy and communal areas.
description: A modern multi-unit house complex with flat and gable roofs, large windows, garages, and landscaped yards, finished in white, gray, and wood tones.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rear and side facades, showing multiple balconies, rooftop terraces, and a mix of flat and gable roofs with visible greenery.
description_view_1: The central driveway and garages are prominent, with the main entrances and front yards of the houses visible, as well as the separation between the two building clusters.
description_view_2: A direct street-facing view showing the main facades, large windows, entryways, and the arrangement of garages and driveways.
description_view_3: A side perspective emphasizing the depth of the property, the fenced yards, and the spatial relationship between the two main building clusters.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature modern doors, some with small overhangs or porches, and are accessed via paved paths or driveways, with minimal decorative elements.
